name: Klaviyo
one_liner: Klaviyo is a marketing automation platform for email, SMS, and customer data, with a comprehensive REST API for managing profiles, campaigns, flows, events, and catalogs.
access_notes: Klaviyo offers a free account tier. Account Owners/Admins can generate private API keys instantly from Settings > API keys with no payment or human approval, giving working server-side credentials. Public keys (Site ID) are available for client-side tracking. OAuth is available for building third-party integrations/apps.
api_notes: Extensive JSON:API-based REST API covering profiles, events, segments, lists, campaigns, flows, templates, catalogs (items/variants/categories), coupons, forms, reviews, metrics, custom objects, webhooks, and more. Well over 100 operations. Versioned via date-based API revisions. Official SDKs available. New endpoints are rate limited per account.
mcp_notes: Klaviyo ships an official MCP server (documented at developers.klaviyo.com/en/docs/klaviyo_mcp_server), available in both remote-hosted and local variants, with OAuth or private API key auth. Klaviyo is listed in Claude's Connector directory. Lets AI clients query campaigns, flows, profiles, and metrics.
main_blocker: None significant. Free self-serve account provides working API credentials immediately.

evidence.claim: Klaviyo provides 3 authentication methods: private key, OAuth, and public key; private keys read/write account data and support scopes.
Klaviyo API is a JSON:API-based REST API covering profiles, events, campaigns, flows, catalogs, webhooks, metrics, and more.
Only Owners or Admins can access the API keys tab; keys are generated from account Settings.
Klaviyo ships an official MCP server (remote and local) with OAuth or private API key auth, listed in Claude's Connector directory.

open_questions: Whether any specific high-volume endpoints or beta features (e.g., customer agents) require additional plan tiers; exact rate limits vary by endpoint and account.
